message:
fix: remove extra arg from formatHookMigrationPlan test calls (bd-ddn)

The test calls on lines 55 and 80 passed a second bool argument to
formatHookMigrationPlan, but the function only takes one parameter
(the plan). Removed the extra argument to match the function signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
